defect: no bushing on RMC where required
prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Rigid & PVC conduit, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: no bushing on RMC where required. The work is staged — materials, tools, and access are ready, but work has not begun. Reference material on hand: NEC Art. 344, 352.
title: Tool and material selection: Rigid & PVC conduit (commercial project)
